title: ammannia coccinea subsp. coccinea
intro: Ammannia coccinea subsp. coccinea, also known as red ammannia or red button plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ammannia coccinea subsp. coccinea include relief from fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
